g.text: In the year 2019, the developer first set foot upon the public forge, and the epic began.
In the year 2020, the developer forsook C++, and there was much refactoring.
In the year 2023, the developer forsook JavaScript, and there was much refactoring.
In the year 2024, the developer forsook TypeScript, and there was much refactoring.
In the year 2026, the developer forsook Python, and there was much refactoring.
Then began the relentless campaign: thirty-six days of unbroken toil.
